subcodes.first_line: Every fair-minded soul hath witnessed what thou hast borne in the path of God, the Lord of creation. Verily, those who are endowed with insight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد کل منصف بما حملته فی سبیل الله مالک الایجاد ان الذین اوتوا بصائر من
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
